summary: Wait for the in-cluster Grafana, Prometheus, Loki, and Tempo services to become available.
command: k3s kubectl -n rx-observability rollout status deploy/grafana --timeout=240s && k3s kubectl -n rx-observability rollout status deploy/prometheus --timeout=240s && k3s kubectl -n rx-observability rollout status deploy/loki --timeout=240s && k3s kubectl -n rx-observability rollout status deploy/tempo --timeout=240s && k3s kubectl -n rx-observability get pods -o wide
expected: Grafana and its data sources are running in k3s.
